title: canna rufa
intro: Canna rufa, also known as the yellow canna or red canna, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cannaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Canna rufa include its ability to reduce pain and swelling, as well as its potential to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Canna rufa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
